name: Sugarless Blueberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 t (teaspoon) Orange or Lemon Rind, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, sift together the flour, salt, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
3. In a small bowl, beat eggs lightly, then add oil, orange juice, and grated rind. Mix well.
4. Gradually add this egg mixture to the flour mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Toss blueberries in the additional flour.
6. Gently fold the blueberries into the batter, stirring gently.
7. Fill 12 or more well-greased muffin tins about 2/3 full with the batter.
8. Bake the muffins for 20-25 minutes.
